title: Immunofluorescence_250206
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2dso7","text":"Protocol for an immunofluorescence assay on paraffin slices. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6vu3r","text":"- Ethanol","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8pkne","text":"- Xylene","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6mu52","text":"- Citric acid buffer (tri-sodium citrate 2,94 g in 1000 ml distilled water, pH adjusted to 6.0 using 1N HCL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cobm6","text":"- Coverslips","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6s8ff","text":"- Distilled water","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dorgi","text":"- MilliQ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"23k0b","text":"- DAPI (D3571, Invitrogen)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e1d70","text":"- Prolong Gold (P36934, Invitrogen)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dd2kq","text":"- PAP pen","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ae53b","text":"- PBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"83n55","text":"- Washing buffer: 0.05% Tween-20 (8.22184, Merck Group) in PBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6jkee","text":"- Blocking buffer: 1% BSA (A3059-50G, Sigma-Aldrich ) and 5% normal donkey serum (ab7475, Abcam) in washing buffer","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: - Xylene, 5 min - Xylene, 5 min - Xylene, 5 min - 96% Ethanol, 5 min - 96% Ethanol, 5 min - 96% Ethanol, 5 min - 70% Ethanol, 5 min - 50% Ethanol, 5 min - MilliQ/aqua dest, 5 min - MilliQ/aqua dest, 5 min - MilliQ/aqua dest, 5 min

- Add citric buffer in microwaveable vessel, use sufficient volume to cover the slides by at least a few cm - Place vessel in microwave - Warm up until boiling - Place slides inmicrowavable vessel - Place the vessel back in the microwave for 12 min. Use non-sealed vessel to allow for evaporation. Watch out for boiling over - After 12 min, remove the vessel and run cold tap water into it for 10 min

- Encircle tissue with PAP pen - Wash for 5 minutes with Washing buffer - Block for 30 minutes with Blocking buffer - Incubate with primary Ab in Blocking buffer overnight at 4°C in a humidified chamber - Wash 3 times with Washing buffer, 5 minutes each - Block for 10 minutes with Blocking buffer - Incubate with secondary Ab in Blocking buffer at RT for 60 minutes (in the dark) including 1:1000 DAPI - Wash 3 times with Washing buffer, 5 minutes each - Mount cells in Prolong gold and affix coverslip
creator: Lucia Grijpink
